---
title: "A Bit of the Theory of Statistics"
date: 2025-08-29
categories: [Python, Statistics]
image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/3729557/pexels-photo-3729557.jpeg"
---

![math's formulas](https://images.pexels.com/photos/3729557/pexels-photo-3729557.jpeg)
*Photo: [Nothing Ahead](https://www.pexels.com/@ian-panelo/) - pexels*

## Task
The project demonstrates several fundamental statistical concepts 
through simulation and hypothesis testing, including:

Combinatorial probability, properties of the normal distribution, 
t-tests for comparing groups, Type I error in hypothesis testing, 
behavior of the binomial distribution.


## Tools
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?logo=python&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/NumPy-013243?logo=numpy&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/pandas-150458?logo=pandas),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Matplotlib-11557C),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/SciPy-8CAAE6?logo=scipy&logoColor=white)

## Full Analysis
[Open the full notebook](../notebooks/problems.html)
